note_text:
*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Diabetic to Right plantar / Measures 1.6 cm x 3.2 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, none. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right plantar wound site, rates 7/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Right plantar measures 1.6 cm x 3.2 cm x 0.3 cm.
  Wound bed: 53% slough, 47% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: none. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Right plantar — improving.
Plan: Physician notified of wound progression. Offloading boot applied.
